_meta.source: IEEE Registration Authority — MA-M (28-bit) OUI registry

_meta.note: Wi-Fi-side twin of bluetooth_ouis_ma_m.json. Both files hold the same MA-M payload (IEEE 28-bit sub-allocations) — twin paths exist for back-compat with the existing BLE / Wi-Fi consumers. Populate via `uv run python scripts/refresh_ouis.py`.
